reviews.review_description: The developers of brisk square have disappeared off the face of the planet and there are several people in the discord who are trying to get their free skin and the devs are not available to give them out anymore. This is just temple run with a sword and there’s not much going for this game anyway.
So are going to get a refund since developers are can't be located? And I was supposed to get this game for $4.99 🤷🏽‍♂️
Think pistol whip with swords. The game is unique and has its own flavor. For 3 dollars just get it!

its not quite there yet. there are a lot of bugs and the campaingn only has 3 levels but I'm really looking up for the other updates because the game is pretty fun to play. One important thing I hope they will add is more abilities to add some more variety.

If you are a fan of Pistol whip, this is a game you will love as well. 
Super fun to play, good workout, and i dig the general style and graphics. 

I do love this game. I got hooked on the free version, so I bought it.  I am only writing this review with hopes that the things that would make it 5 stars become a reality.

1. Add a party mode.
2. Finish the campaign mode.
3. Make the begining levels a little easier. (Its real tough to make progress)
4. The "hand gun* is too tough to use. 
5. Add an arcade mode.

Awful hit recognition and bad tutorial that barely explains the basics

Easily the worst experience I have ever had on any vr game

I really love this game. The game makes me game back and play again, push myself for a better score. For me this is a 10/10

reviews.review_title: FOR THE LOVE OF GOD READ BEFORE GETTING
reviews.review_description:
ok so I’m going to start off by saying it’s not the game that is bad,what is is how it looks NOTHING like the video,and it’s the exact same game of the early access brisk square but with a 15$ campaign that looks god aful and is not even finished,there is no differens from this and the early access one except the campaign,multiplayer:the exact same,graphics:the same

Don’t waste you money here,and please just get the early access,it’s free,not that buggy,and the same game as this one


(Updated)

Ok so I can’t use discord,so hopefully you read this again,the only reason I gave the game a 1 star was because of how you were selling it.you should not go and show people the “update”on the page if it’s not even there(the update that is),but don’t get me wrong,the game is hella fun,but the fact that you basically show people one thing,and give them another is very scumbag like,and I do plan to still get a refund,so maybe,just maybe I will get this game again in the future,but for now I’m just going to stick with the early access.thank you for noticing this review,and I really hope you make this game better,but please,15$ for a god aful campaign that looks like it was made by a dog?not a great start

developer_response.body:
Hi facepunchjoe! Thank you very much for your feedback. We are currently working on the points you have mentioned above and new update is coming very soon.
If you are willing to share more details or if you have any suggestion on how to improve the game, please feel free to contact us on our discord server.

reviews.review_description:
I have tried games that provide thrill and require physical activity. But none of them at the level of Brisk Square.
While the idea is quite simple, cut, shoot and don’t get shot, it get’s your blood pumping.
It has the nostalgia of mobile infinite runner games mixed with the excitement of something new and unique.
After some runs, my arm hurts and I am exhausted.

reviews.review_title: Wow i saw it on tt
reviews.review_description: This game is good
The game is awesome and addicting and the best part is you dont have to grindthe cobcept is simple and the execution amazing
I love this game, it helps relive my stress and calms me down. 10 out of 10 would recomend
The game is amazing and I played the early access and I loved it for the longest
Nice  : )  hard to me but very good
Honestly the experience I had with this game is amazing, good physics and a good concept that’s rarely used, the developers of the game are really good aswell, overall great experience
Brisk square is a pretty fun game but it may take awhile to get used to the mechanics. Overall this game is very fun and worth the $10.
Its a Great game but you need som space to play it

I have only had this game for a day and it is amazing, including leaderboards, skins and different levels such as campaign its great. I told my friend to get it and we have been playing all day in the multiplayer mode with other people on their public servers too! I would definitely buy it again and in the discord you can request your own skins and claim anything from the shop if you buy this week! :)

This game doesn't get repetitive and always keeps you moving the music gets you into the zone and the neon light everywhere makes it feel like your really in a futuristic world with the cyber look to the whole play area! 10/10 would recommend to anyone who enjoys this style and look of these games
Amazing fun love it❤️
